description_long: This is a classic white baseball with a smooth, slightly glossy leather surface and visible red stitching. The ball is nearly spherical, with two curved seams running across its surface, each featuring evenly spaced red stitches. The leather appears tightly stretched, giving the ball a firm and uniform texture. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or league emblems on any side of the ball. The surface is clean and unblemished, showing no signs of wear, scuffing, or discoloration. The overall appearance is that of a new, regulation baseball suitable for play or display in urban parks, sports fields, or recreational areas.
description: A pristine white baseball with red stitching and a smooth, glossy leather surface. No logos or markings are visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing a smooth white surface with a single curved seam and red stitches visible near the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the seam curving from the upper left to the lower right, with red stitches more prominently displayed.
description_view_2: Another side view with the seam running diagonally, showing a clean white surface and evenly spaced red stitches.
description_view_3: Rear view with the seam and red stitches visible near the top edge, and a mostly uninterrupted white surface.
attribute_stitch_pattern: Two curved seams with evenly spaced red stitches, forming a figure-eight pattern typical of baseballs.
